name: example-admin-ai-copilot
title: AI Copilot Admin
description: Admin dashboard with a permanent AI copilot rail. Deterministic widget canvas on the left, conversational agent on the right, Cmd+K command palette, inline suggestion chips, tool-call cards. The 2025 pattern for agentic admin UIs.

query.en: Build an admin dashboard with a permanent AI copilot rail — left = widget canvas with KPIs / chart / table, right = chat with tool-call cards, top = Cmd+K palette, bottom status with agent idle/working.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build an admin dashboard with a permanent AI copilot rail — left = widget canvas with KPIs / chart / table, right = chat with tool-call cards, top = Cmd+K palette, bottom status with agent idle/working.
